title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context) with coding-focused continued pre-training and long-horizon reinforcement learning. The training pipeline includes auto-install for bootstrapping environments, reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties, and self-summarization to handle context limits. Cursor Bench is used as an internal evaluation on ambiguous prompts and multi-file diffs from real engineer queries.
